purpose: External package manifest for safe-cut follow-up gates without editing the static package registry for each hypothesis.

packages.hypothesis: Gods Willing had a positive targeted-protection signal when measured over Promise of Loyalty, but Promise is registry-protected. This safe-cut follow-up preserves Promise and tests Gods Willing over Avatar's Wrath, a slower protection/pressure slot already used as the non-protected benchmark in other protection packages.

Past in Flames had positive signal when tested over Bender's Waterskin, but Bender is protected by the current registry/cut-safety guard. This follow-up preserves the protected ramp shell and tests Past in Flames over Big Score, a one-shot discard/draw/Treasure card-flow slot in the same spell-velocity lane.
